products.description: Monthly Pro alerts, insights, and planning.
products.reviewNote: Open the app and tap Pro. Select Monthly in the Monthly / Annual toggle. The screen displays The Rise Pro Monthly, one-month duration, localized StoreKit price, renewal and cancellation terms, Restore Purchases, Privacy Policy, and Terms of Use before the Subscribe Monthly button.

products.description: Annual Pro alerts, insights, and planning.
products.reviewNote: Open the app and tap Pro. Select Annual in the Monthly / Annual toggle. The screen displays The Rise Pro Annual, one-year duration, localized StoreKit price, renewal and cancellation terms, Restore Purchases, Privacy Policy, and Terms of Use before the Subscribe Annual button.
